subject: iPhone not receiving text messages (SMS/iMessage)
description: User reports missed texts — some contacts' messages never arrive while iMessages from other iPhone users work fine.

ts_steps.title: Check message settings
ts_steps.action: Settings → Messages — ensure iMessage is toggled on; tap Send & Receive and confirm the correct phone number and Apple ID are checked.

ts_steps.title: Verify cellular and blocked contacts
ts_steps.action: Confirm cellular signal is present (not Wi-Fi only); Settings → Messages → Blocked Contacts — ensure the missing sender is not on the block list.

ts_steps.title: Reset messaging stack
ts_steps.action: Toggle iMessage off, restart iPhone, toggle iMessage back on; if SMS specifically fails, remove and reseat SIM card (or reset eSIM activation for eSIM-only models).

internal_information: SMS requires active cellular registration; iMessage requires Apple ID activation. Users switching from Android may need to deregister iMessage on Apple's site. Carrier filtering can silently drop messages.
